programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E53 - School Run'. The twins are excited about visiting their new school for the first time.

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Waffle Make and Do'. With Doug's help, Waffle makes new neighbour, Pepper, a dog-bed. It's made from a cardboard box and shaped like a castle.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E18 - City Machines'. In this episode Grace looks at three amazing city machines: an electric scooter car, a fold up electric bike and a hydrogen train.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Hot-Air Balloons and Patchwork'. Momo goes for a ride in a hot air balloon, while Chris and Pui make a giant patchwork picture.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: 'S5/E9 - Digging And Roadworks'. Everyone gets busy digging holes for Teddington's golf balls, and Chris helps Old MacDonald.

programme.title: Woolly & Tig
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Piano'. Tig doesn't listen to her piano teacher.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S13/E15 - Afro-Caribbean Vegetables'. The Teletubbies watch some children buy different sorts of vegetables.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Tombliboo Ooo Drinks Everybody Else's Pinky Ponk Juice'. Join Upsy Daisy and friends in a magical world halfway between waking and sleeping. Tombliboo Ooo keeps drinking all the Pinky Ponk juice.

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - Special Me'. When Laila encourages David to refresh his interest in his Cantonese lessons, David gets excited that he can finally read the message on his Grandma's postcard and inspires a special solution for his poster.

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E27 - Wobbly Teeth'. Sam's upset David by telling him stories about going to the dentist. There's no way that Kobi or Patience are going to convince David to go for his check up now!

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Fish'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'fish' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different fish - a flying fish, a gold fish and even some kissing fish!

programme.title: Nina And The Neurons: Earth Explorers
programme.desc: 'S8/E23 - Deserts'. The explorers visit Death Valley in America to look at how the heat has dried up all the water.

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Hot and Cold'. Kit and Pup are at the beach. Can you see if the beach is hot or cold? Kit and Pup are also helping a little investigator sort clothes for hot and cold weather.

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Soil'. Kit and Pup are gardening. The soil is too hard to dig, so Kit and Pup need to come up with a solution.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Bowl'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'bowl' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore lots of different types of bowls.

programme.title: Andy's Wild Workouts
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - African Savannah'. Andy heads to Africa and meets some incredible creatures along the way. He pronks with springbok, prowls with lions and swings his trunk with a herd of elephants.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animals
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Getting Around'. Andy Day looks at a selection of baby animals as they learn how to stand up and move around.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Saturday Night Shaun'. Shaun finds the Farmer's old record player on the dump and organises a rave in the barn. But trouble looms when the Naughty Pigs gate-crash the party.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E22'. Bill and Ben come up with a new game where they hide trucks and make the other engines look for them.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Postman Pat and the Amazing Weather Machine'. Ajay's organised a Summer Special Day on the Green but the sun is too hot. Ted's invention, a weather machine, might save the day!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Postman Pat and the Super Skateboard Sizzle'. Ajay's organised a big 'Skateboard Sizzle' competition for everyone, now he must wait for Pat to deliver his new skateboard and safety gear.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E16'. Cbeebies is a brightly coloured world full of stories, discovery and giggles. It's a place where your child's curiosity about the world can be nurtured

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Growing Sunflowers'. Mummy gives Topsy and Tim some sunflower seeds to grow, and Tim fears the worse when he loses one of them.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Fruit Salad'. Welcome to the fabulous fun fruit factory, where Three's super fruit-sorting machines aren't giving her any fruit.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Postman Pat and the Sticky Situation'. Dorothy has bought a super shiny new Quad Bike for her husband Alf's birthday. Pat has to deliver it, complete with its big red bow before Alf gets home.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E17'. Cbeebies is a brightly coloured world full of stories, discovery and giggles. It's a place where your child's curiosity about the world can be nurtured

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E14'. Join Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers on an eco quest to discover one of nature's wonders and the important role it plays in our environment.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Big Box'. The duo cannot wait to find out what is inside the box that they have taken care of for Mr Fishwick.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S23/E17'. A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Spy Game'. When Bingo stops playing Bluey's spy game, their grown-up controlling device stops working properly! Bluey now sees how important Bingo is and needs to win her back!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Takeaway'. Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S3/E28 - The Round Up Badge'. The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Postman Pat and The Eco Igloo'. Pat and Jess have a very special delivery - blocks of ice to the school so that they can make an igloo. It's such a hot day though - can Pat make the delivery before the ice melts?

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E23 - Secret Life Of Paige Birgfeld'. Featuring the story of how Paige Birgfeld's family got a call telling them she was missing in 2008, but no-one was prepared for the revelations the investigation would unearth.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E2 - Show Me The Money'. Featuring the story of bank manager Michelle Renee, whose life was turned upside down when three masked gunmen burst into her home and took her family hostage.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Carrs'. The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released To Kill
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - David Cook'. After murdering a teacher, David Cook was released from prison after 21 years. Tragically, just three years later, he strangled a pensioner to death.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Dream Killer'. Kent Heitholt, a sports editor in Columbia, Missouri, was found bludgeoned and strangled on the night of Halloween in 2001. Two years later, a much-needed tip on the case arrived.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Blood Is Thicker Than Water'. After divorce, a single mother didn't expect to find love again, but a charming stranger wins her heart. Desperate to keep his love, she'd do anything to prove her loyalty.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - By Any Means Necessary'. When her father passes away, a young woman finds solace in a new man. But when he ropes her into one of his criminal schemes, she finds herself in the midst of a blood bath.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - A Deadly Inheritance'. Kelly and her team head to Polk County, Oregon to figure out the mysterious disappearance of a man who vanished from his home without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Beyond The Grave'. Kelly and her team head to Pascagoula, Mississippi to figure out if the tragic shooting death of a young man was an accident, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Home Alone'. In Hope, Arkansas, Kelly and her team investigate the murder of a young mother who was brutally executed in her home.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E3 - The Untold Story Of Caylee Anthony'. The trial of Casey Anthony for her daughter's murder captivated the American public. In this programme, three of her defense lawyers discuss the shocking case.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E4 - Haunted'. Private investigators Paul Ciolino and Joe Moura examine the brutal killings of Mike Sisco and his fiancée Karen Harkness in 2007, a double homicide with a bizarre twist.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Slayed In Soho'. When an aspiring writer and painter in the vibrant Soho art scene of the early 80s is found murdered just two days after her debut book is published, her devastated husband offers a critical clue.

programme.title: New York Homicide

programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing Butterflies in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alice's Stormy Afternoon / Into the Tulgey Wood'. Alice makes a treat for the baby buds, but goes overboard with a special ingredient. Rosa's first camping trip goes awry when her guards follow.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Snurfy Murphy/New Rock on the Block'. It's warm in Rocky Falls and it causes Murphy to 'snurf,' a hiccup-like habit unique to mammoths. Eureka volunteers to move a mysterious meteorite out of the town before sunset.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E123 - The Power of Mystery Mountain / the Power of Mystery Mountain Part Ii'. Mystery Mountain breaks out of its dimension and floats over the city.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E124 - Slow and Sneaky / the Pj Riders Save the Day'. Romeo challenges Carly and Cartoka to a race, but it's all part of a sneaky plan to steal speed crystals. The PJ Riders are jealous when the PJs plan to restore their vehicles.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E129 - Heroes of the Road/ Heroes of the Road Part 2'. The PJ Masks can't wait to use their PJ Vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But as a result, they don't work well with Newton or their PJ Animals.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E130 - Heroes of the Road Part Iii/ Heroes of the Road Part 4'. The PJMs can't wait to use their vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But they don't work well with Newton.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Stop Doc Ock'. Doc Ock sends her favorite octo-bot, CAL, to infiltrate WEB-Quarters with a new invention. Spidey reminds Hulk to use self-control after Rhino challenges him to a strength contest.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Snurfy Murphy/New Rock on the Block'. It's warm in Rocky Falls and it causes Murphy to 'snurf,' a hiccup-like habit unique to mammoths. Eureka volunteers to move a mysterious meteorite out of the town before sunset.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. JoJo comes down with the Upsie-Dodo-Downsies! Alice must find a recipe that helps her feel better. Hattie and Fergie lose the recipe card for a royal dish.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - River Rescue/ Big Tread'. Bo fails to watch a young wee-hicle, and they both end up stuck on a raft in the creek. Piston must overcome his fears of mythical monster trucks to save his lost friends.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Sleepover Stakeout/ Rescue Club'. Jayden plans a sleepover stakeout to catch the thief of his new invention. Carly wants to join the school's Rescue Club, even though she's not a rescue vehicle like the Firebuds.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E110 - Unicorse'. Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E111 - Curry Quest'. When they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park, Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E112 - Magic'. Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule - never use magic for cheekiness!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E113 - Chest'. Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E114 - Sheepdog'. Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest. But looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E115 - Housework'. Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but it never happens and they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Car in a Tree/ Dalmatian Day'. When the Firebuds visit the moto-skate park, Piston gets stuck in a tree. The Firebuds are asked to watch puppies, but when Bo underestimates the task, the puppies escape.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E90'. Desperate to prove himself, Gekko recruits Armadylan for extra training. Catboy wants to increase his speed... but in doing so, drains power from his friends.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E96 - The Sunshine Pups'. When Ana's ring rolls down the sink, the Pugs set out to recover it. Bingo, Rolly, and Bob find themselves stranded in the middle of nowhere on Bob and Ana's wedding day!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Hawaii Pug-Oh/A. R. F.'. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii in search of sand. Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog programmed to clean up their mess.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Because Triceratops!/Rock Out'. Tiny performs a triceratops rite of passage. Rocky sets out to prove that he's the ultimate tough guy, like Giganto, but discovers that everyone needs help sometimes.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Air Archie/The Imitator'. Mazu makes Archie a pair of wings to help him fly. Marsh copies Rocky's every move while Rocky copies Giganto.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Biggest Hero/Think Quick'. Rocky gets jealous when Tiny suddenly becomes the go-to hero! Mazu may be a slow runner but is a quick thinker.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Please Don't Pick The Flowers/No Joke'. Bill accidentally changes Cretacia's ecosystem when he eats too many rare swamp flowers. Dilo pulls pranks on the dinos!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Seeing Stars/A Tiny Triumph'. Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny's artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Runaway Dough/The Copymonster'. When baking, Henry adds too much yeast and makes a giant dough ball that escapes. Henry's scout troop builds racing cars and he's flattered when Roberto copies him.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Henry Show/Megabouncers'. After seeing sister Summer's show, Henry decides to do his own. But it proves harder than it looked, and after a disaster, Henry asks for Summer's advice. This time it's a success.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Piano Lesson, Monster Wave'. Henry's thrilled when Gertie turns up, but she's come for a piano lesson with Momma so he tries to sabotage it! Henry goes to the wave park.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Astrobrix/The Sore Roar'. Cobby's model spaceship flies away and Henry rescues it. Henry loses his voice while practising for the loudest roar contest but still helps by running the Roar-o-Meter.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Termy Steps Out / the Tooth Fairy'. Termy wants to visit her good friend Hegan's new babies, Pride and Joy. Rocky is excited when Giganto loses a tooth because that means the Tooth Fairy will visit and leave loot!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Paint the Town/ Henry Inc.'. The kids want Roarsville to win the Most Beautiful Town competition. The prize is a new playground. They start tidying, then Henry decides to turn the town into a work of art. Henry, Incorporated:

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Henry's Hugglejuice Stand/The Huggledance Party'. Henry sells sweet flower juice but uses them all up. Cobby builds a robot DJ to provide music for Henry's party but won't come as he can't dance.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E55 - Adventures in Egg Sitting / Rainbow's End'. The four little dinos are tasked with watching Hegan's eggs, which are soon to hatch. When the dinos learn about a treasure at the end of a rainbow, Rocky is determined to find it!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Termy Steps Out / the Tooth Fairy'. Termy wants to visit her good friend Hegan's new babies, Pride and Joy. Rocky is excited when Giganto loses a tooth because that means the Tooth Fairy will visit and leave loot!

programme.title: Mickey's Monster Musical
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are stranded near a spooky castle. They meet Count Mikula who looks like Mickey - except for his fangs and the fact that he can fly! He has a problem too. Can they help each other?

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E41 - Moon Marooned'. After not listening to the warnings, Pirate Robot gets himself and Newton captured.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E42 - Newton and the Star Splat'. Newton creates a powerful Star Splat.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E97 - The Labour of Armadylan/Lost in Space'. Armadylan tries to fix a museum artifact without telling the PJ Masks. Romeo wants to create the ultimate trap for the PJ Masks.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Merry Chickmas / Feed the Brrrrds'. The Chicken Squad tries to create the best holiday decorations in the neighborhood! A snowstorm frustrates the Squad's attempts to track down missing bird food.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Work'. In a game of Work, Bluey and Bingo are the latest hires at Dad's drainpipe factory.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E33 - Trampoline'. Dad can't go to work until he has played all of Bluey and Bingo's trampoline games

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E34 - The Dump'. On a car trip to the dump, Bluey discovers that Dad is throwing out her old drawings.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - Zoo'. Bingo causes chaos at Bluey's backyard zoo, when she sneaks into Daddy Gorilla's cage.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Backpackers'. Mum and Dad are going on an adventure with Bluey and Bingo as their backpacks!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E53 - Hammerbarn'. Chilli and Bandit are keen to get a new pizza oven like their neighbours' so they all go on a trip to Hammerbarn.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E54 - Feather Wand'. When a passing cockatoo drops a feather, Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E55 - Dance Mode'. Dad eats Bingo's last chip and as payback, Bingo has three 'dance mode' wishes to use at will.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cliffhanger/ the Very First Fire'. Iggy and Rod fall onto a narrow ledge and The Buds must learn to do things the safe way in order to rescue them. A park play fort catches fire and Bo knows The Buds can put it out.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Good Guy Gobby'. Green Goblin decides to quit being a villain and become a good guy! Rhino steals a Spider Monkey from the zoo, and it's up to Spidey and Ghost-Spider to bring him home.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Order Up! / Teeny-tiny Venture'. Hattie and Fergie use teacup carts to deliver bakery orders while getting into friendly competition. Alice and Rosa shrink before Rosa's Knighting Ceremony.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E116 - Pass the Parcel'. Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E117 - Perfect'. Bluey's Father's Day card has to be perfect, but she can't decide what to draw! Mum reminds her about all the fun times she's had with Dad and how he's not so perfect either.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E119 - Phones'. Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurant with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E120 - Pavlova'. The kids play Café so Bingo can eat Pavlova, but Dad the chef never seems to get the order quite right! When Bluey fires him, Dad sets up his own competing shop next door.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E121 - Rain'. When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hubcap Heist/ Food Truck Fiasco'. The Firebuds must get a stolen painting back from a pair of wily kid-thieves. The Firebuds set out to find their missing friend, but Flash is in such a rush, he makes mistakes.

programme.desc: A group of friends go out to celebrate their friend's engagement, but the party turns into a nightmare when her ex kidnaps her fiance to get revenge for his ruined reputation.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: One year after meeting, Tom proposes to his girlfriend but unexpected events keep crippling their plans to matrimony.

programme.title: Deadly B And B
programme.desc: A single mother restores a Victorian home and turns it into a bed-and-breakfast, but the arrival of a guest with a hidden agenda shatters the peace.

programme.desc: Entertainment highlights, news and reviews.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful finance executive has a crisis of confidence and his career goes downhill, he finds the solution to all his problems in his daughter's imaginary world.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: Jack, a successful advertising executive, annually dreads the Thanksgiving visit of his identical twin sister Jill. Her neediness turns his normally tranquil life upside down.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: A spoof of vampire-themed movies, where a teenager finds herself torn between two boys, while her friends contend with their own romantic issues, which all collide at their prom.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of DreamWorks 'Trolls'. When their village is invaded by the grumpy Bergens, two mismatched friends must work together in perfect harmony to save the day.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: Garden gnomes, Gnomeo and Juliet, recruit renowned detective Sherlock Gnomes to investigate the mysterious disappearance of other garden ornaments.

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker
programme.desc: Old friends get together for a high school reunion, only for a crime to set off a series of tragic events.

programme.title: The Killer Downstairs

programme.desc: When a woman is stuck with vacation reservations in her ex-boyfriend's name, her two best friends advise her to go with another guy if she can't change the tickets.

programme.title: We Are Your Friends
programme.desc: Caught between a forbidden romance and the expectations of his friends, aspiring DJ Cole Carter attempts to find the path in life that leads to fame and fortune.

programme.desc: An eclectic group of people drawn from all walks of life find themselves under one roof for twenty-eight days with one thing in common, addiction.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: An undercover super-assassin finds true love, but a picture-perfect marriage will not save him from becoming a target himself.

programme.title: On Angel's Wing
programme.desc: When the star player for the Angel's Soccer Team is injured Coach Carter decides to play the water girl,

programme.desc: The true story of Jasmine Plummer who, at the age of eleven, became the first female to play in Pop Warner football tournament in its 56-year history.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: We bring world issues into focus through the experiences of men, women and children at the heart of the story.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The Reykjanes peninsula in Iceland hasn't seen any volcanic activity for over 1000 years, until now. For a whole year the fishing village of Grindavik is rocked by huge earthquakes.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E4'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. While Becky Brodrick and her husband are busy building an exercise enclosure for their working dogs, Pierre-Yves and Kim need to collect berries and fish for a hgh-energy food boost during the winter.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Sharks'. Steve uncovers the secrets of sharks, the world's most infamous predators. He heads out into the Atlantic Ocean to dive with blue sharks, a beautiful but deadly species.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Egypt'. Ben journeys to North Africa to live with American widow Maryanne on the farm she's built on the edge of the Sahara. He discovers why she swapped her city abode for a simpler and tougher way of life.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - New Zealand'. Ben journeys off the coast of New Zealand's North Island to Great Barrier Island, where he meets a man who gave up his promising scientific career to embrace life in an off-grid, secluded world.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E1 of 2'. Sue starts her journey at the western end of the border, in the Mexican city of Tijuana, where she discovers an unexpected invasion of migrants.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E2 of 2'. Sue visits the Mexican city of Juarez, which adjoins El Paso, Texas. She meets Gabriela, who is bringing up her kids alone in El Paso as her husband is stuck in Juarez.

programme.title: Puerto Rico: Island Of Enchantment
programme.desc: A team of conservation champions are trying to save precious species which live in Puerto Rico. Find out how parrots, manatees, and turtles are making a comeback.

programme.title: Attenborough's Wonder Of Song
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Episode 1'. Sir David Attenborough tunes in to the remarkable sounds of the natural world, an open-air festival of songs of procreation and survival. But will they soon be heard no more?

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E2'. The story of the Marsh Pride continues with testimony from those who filmed them, those who tried to protect them and those who hunted them.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Maltloaf'. Gregg Wallace sees how maltloaf is produced on a mass-scale.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Volcano expert Chris Horsley is called back to the Congo to investigate a potentially lethal threat to over two-million people. After a recent eruption, a huge 10-mile-long fracture has appeared in the ground.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: Voices Of The Dead
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Using the latest geological and forensic research, Bettany reveals a blow-by-blow sequence of events as Vesuvius erupts, culminating in the tragic and shocking deaths of our characters.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: Voices Of The Dead
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Using the latest geological and forensic research, Bettany reveals a blow-by-blow sequence of events as Vesuvius erupts, culminating in the tragic and shocking deaths of our characters.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alexander witnesses a volcanic eruption, visits the original geyser, learns about the Icelandic belief in elves, takes a trip to an unusual museum and meets an Icelandic rock band.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Predator Power'. Steve goes in search of some of the most powerful predators on the planet. At historic Warwick Castle, we meet the stellar sea eagle, the world's heaviest eagle.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Volcanoes'. Looking at active and dormant volcanoes from Vesuvius in Italy to Ki-lauea in Hawaii. We'll hear from some of the world's leading volcanologists and discover the deadly secrets of the volcano.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Pandemics'. Looking at the terrifying recent outbreaks of Swine Flu and Ebola in places as diverse as West Africa, Hong Kong and Germany, we'll gain fascinating insights from some of the world's leading disease researchers.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Philippines'. Ben joins coconut farmer Neil and his young family in their hillside bamboo house, where Neil is apparently the only white man in his jungle village.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Delta'. Sue visits the beautiful mangroves of the Sundarbans, home of the Bengal tiger, and meets the villagers who live in fear of an attack.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Into the Night'. Sue Aikens must protect Kavik from the dangers that lurk in the shadows. The Hailstones use the cover of night to search for food under the ice.

programme.title: Living Wild: How to Change Your Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Sophie heads for coastal Cornwall and Devon woodlands. She also goes foraging on a remote Scottish island and visits a floating salon in Cheshire.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Airlander 10'. Revealing the secret behind the construction of Airlander 10, the world's largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - India'. Ben Fogle journeys to the foothills of the Indian Himalayas to live with former fighter pilot Steve Lall, who is now a mountain farmer.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Bone Cold'. The Hailstones brave the freeze to seek new land for the expanding family. Sue Aikens must replenish her resources in Chena to survive the brutal cold.

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E2'. The story of the Marsh Pride continues with testimony from those who filmed them, those who tried to protect them and those who hunted them.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. A film following a young meerkat queen living in the harsh beauty of the Makgadikgadi salt pans.

programme.title: Patrick Ayree's Wild World
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Join Patrick in the Great Plains of North America, as he explores the intricate web that connects grasses and dung beetles to bison and the grizzly bear.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Australia'. Ben returns to a remote Australian island to find out how former businessman David Glasheen is getting on. For more than twenty years David enjoyed a life of peace but must survive by growing his own vegetables.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Seal the Deal'. After losing a cache of winter meat last season, Kim and Pierre look to the land for a source of emergency food. Bentley and his wife Felica explore Schade Lake, hunting for early season beave.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World. S1/E1'. Joanna Lumley is on an adventure to three of the world's greatest cities - Berlin, Paris and Rome.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Summer Block Party'. The gang is throwing summer block party! They prepare dishes including smoked drumsticks, shrimp, corn and bean salad and a pink lemonade cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Baby Shower'. Molly makes a delicious buffet spread for her sister-in-law's baby shower. Her menu features meatless meatball sliders, 'walking' fish tacos and baked donuts.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Chinese Family Faves'. Molly makes a range of family recipes to celebrate a visit from her dad. Dishes include scallion pancakes with maple carrot slaw, and sprinkles cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Girl's Brunch'. Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to her best brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. The menu includes mini quiches with peas and bacon and garlic lemon kale.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - New Farm Traditions'. Molly puts a fresh twist on classic farm lunch staples for a picnic. She serves up garlic and onion Challah bread, home-made hummus, and olive oil blondies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Mom Comes To Town'. Molly Yeh's mum visits from Chicago for garden planting and a campfire supper, which includes breakfast tacos, charred sweet corn salsa and raspberry marshmallows.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Thanksgiving'. Molly Yeh hosts Thanksgiving on the farm. Her menu includes sweet-and-smoky turkey, pretzel stuffing, creamed corn and lemon almond cake with cranberry glaze.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Harvest Party'. Molly throws her annual supper party to celebrate the end of the harvest. She serves up goulash with bread dumplings and finishes with a spiced apple pie.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Entertaining The Girls'. Molly prepares a special menu to make ahead for her visiting girlfriends. Dishes include sticky rhubarb short ribs and whipped cheesecakes.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E11 - Gold Medal Games: Grand Finale'. The champions return for a shot at the $50,000 prize money. Their culinary skills are pushed to the limit, with very difficult challenges.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E13 - You've Been Canned'. A canned product leaves one chef in an unusual predicament. And, the competitors must create dishes featuring octopus and molluscs.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S37/E1 - Tacos And Tequila'. Four aspiring chefs create their best dishes using mystery ingredients for a panel of judges. It's fiesta time as they take on tacos and tequila-themed baskets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Chengdu'. From the blistering 'hot pot' and fiery mapo tofu to spicy kung pao chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes of Chengdu, China.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Shanghai'. Andrew Zimmern explores the popular tastes of Shanghai, China, from creamy crab and savoury pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - San Antonio'. Andrew Zimmern showcases the Tex-Mex favourites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos, melt-in-the-mouth barbacoa and a giant chalupa burger.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Dallas'. Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavours that are decidedly Dallas - from comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chiang Mai'. Andrew Zimmern reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand, from coconut curry soup and a sausage with pork and chilli paste, to fish roasted in banana leaves.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Phnom Penh'. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine in Phnom Penh.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Cape Town'. Andrew Zimmern samples the cuisine of Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city is also known for seafood.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E6 - Quick And Easy Sweet Treats'. Ree cooks up some sweet treats in her kitchen! She makes a puff pastry braid with nuts and chocolate and her irresistible four-berry chimichangas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E7 - Let's Get Toasted'. It's a feast for toast lovers in Ree's ranch kitchen! She makes a creamy chicken pot pie served on crispy brioche and an incredible French onion grilled cheese.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E8 - Super Easy Italian'. Ree Drummond serves up simple dishes with an Italian spin. First up, she makes Italian beef sandwiches followed by a spaghetti pizza pie and mozzarella sticks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E9 - What To Bring'. Ree celebrates Thanksgiving with delicious dishes to take to holiday parties. She makes caramelized onion and white cheddar mac and pumpkin scones with coffee glaze.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E10 - One Potato, Two Potato'. Ree cooks up delicious dishes with different kinds of potatoes! She makes purple sweet potato soup and shares the secret ingredient in her potato dumplings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E11 - Small Bites, Big Day'. Ree is full of Christmas spirit and makes delicious small bites for the big day! She cooks peppermint rolls, crispy cauliflower cakes and festive steak bites.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Attitude Of Gratitude'. It's a holiday pantry raid as nine bakers create canned fruit desserts! Later they make Thanksgiving pies with heartfelt messages on top.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Christmas Cookie Games'. Five talented cookie makers play a game of opposites with Christmas cookie designs. And, they create edible 3-D board games that Ree and Eddie can play!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S20/E10 - Anguish In Abilene'. In Abilene, Texas, Robert Irvine meets Texas Cowboy BBQ co-owners George and Taylor, whose restaurant and marriage is on the rocks.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Worst Christmas Ever'. Paige Davis challenges three bakers to use their sense of humour and make their best gingerbread creations while envisioning the worst Christmas ever.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown

programme.desc: 'S26/E7 - Mustache Takeover'. Talented chefs Saransh Oberoi and Tom Cuomo bring their skills and enviable moustaches to the kitchen to intimidate Bobby Flay on two levels.

programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Peril Patch/Sibling Quibbling'. The Trolls must figure out how to destroy a mysterious mini-gold course that bloomed in the Village. To Chenille's dismay, Satin befriends a troll who loves extreme sports.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Kung Boov/Werewolves Of Chicago'. Tip teaches Oh her version of kung fu so he can stand up to a bully. Oh finds a real wolf to teach him how to become a werewolf for Halloween.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Racetrack'. Ton-Ton's friends, The 'Dumps, visit the Flatirons but are too wild and crazy for the crew, so the Dinotrux build a racetrack perfect for joyriding.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Racetrack'. Ton-Ton's friends, The 'Dumps, visit the Flatirons but are too wild and crazy for the crew, so the Dinotrux build a racetrack perfect for joyriding.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Handcuffs/Wright Bros.'. Christine won't release Peabody from handcuffs until he lets her sing. The Wright brothers must get their plane back from a flock of angry birds.

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Aromageddon/ Found Temple Of Gold'. It's time for George and Ape's annual bath, and George swaps his tree house for a temple of gold.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Bumpy And The Remote Control'. When Bumpy gets hold of Whiz's new Control-it-all remote, he causes havoc around Toyland. Noddy plans to use a big pool of sticky jelly to stop Bumpy in his tracks.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Teacher Of The Year'. Mrs Hogenmuller is being evaluated for a 'Teacher of the Year' award, and Olivia is determined to make sure everything goes smoothly.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. When Dad's elaborate scale house model is destroyed, Olivia takes it upon herself to build another one before Dad returns home with his important client.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Why Warthog Is Ugly'. Why is Warthog so ugly? Well, you see that's what happens when you run headfirst into Porcupine's burrow.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Case Of The Little Lost Toy'. Smartysaurus is delighted because a little clockwork duck has appeared at the DinoLab.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Case Of Jumpy Revs'. Something very strange is happening in Toyland. Lots of things seem to be jumping in a particular direction for no reason - Revs, Noddy's bell, Big Ear's spoons and kettle.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Bob and Larry take Ichabeezer on an adventure, doing all the things they think he wants to do. Pa Grape asks Madame Blueberry to sing a new jingle for his store.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Working Stiff'. In an effort to raise a few quick bucks for her Mom's birthday present, Birch takes a job in the cafeteria.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Star-Struck'. Cosmos' High is putting on a rendition of the Broadway musical 'Teenland' and Pod 4 is excited to hit the floorboards.

programme.title: 3-2-1 Penguins!
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. The Penguins are called to the island planet of Wiki Tiki which is in danger of being engulfed by a large volcano.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Bahama Drama'. The Wanderers visit penguins in Antarctica. Odlulu and Fritz use the Ice Castle Key, but separate some penguins from their eggs. The Wanderers must reunite them.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Dragon'. Puss vows to slay a dragon terrorising nearby towns, but when he discovers it's a baby dragon under the weather, he decides to bring it back home.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Super Cool Big Kids Inc.'. Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior centre, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies.

programme.title: Turbo Fast
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Smoovin' On Up/The Great Shell Robbery'. When Smoove Move becomes a world-famous pedicurist, fame goes to his head, the crew plans to retrieve their shells after hermit crabs steal them.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion

programme.desc: 'S9/E23 - Auctions Arriba!'. Having heard of the recent scores, Dave does not intend to let another great locker get by and Rene attempts some inside information.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E25 - Sundown Showdown'. Ivy and Mary start the evening with some not-so-friendly competition. Darrell and Brandon are in their home turf looking for another great locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E26 - Father Bids Best'. Darrell and Brandon look to instigate the other buyers and sneak through the melee. Rene brings his father Gunter to the auction, resulting in laughs and profits.

programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Code Red'. The team from UFO Magazine open their files and investigate UFO cases around the world. Using scientific experimentation and incredible footage, they piece together compelling evidence of UFO phenomena.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - The UFO Before Roswell'. The team from UFO Magazine open their files and investigate UFO cases around the world. Using scientific experimentation and footage, they piece together compelling evidence of UFO phenomena.

programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Invasion Illinois'. Series examining UFO sightings, alien abductions and government cover-ups, beginning with an investigation into multiple sightings of bright lights in Illinois in 2004.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Heartland Explosion'. The team finds new evidence concerning the strange booms and menacing orange lights that panicked people in Indiana in 2008, upending theories that it was a military jet.

programme.desc: 'S4/E12 - Phony Baloney'. The team gets to work on a miniature Model T found in a junkyard. Plus, a firefighter brings in a vintage 1930s forest field service phone for a makeover.

programme.desc: 'S4/E15 - Pimp Chum's Ride'. Pawn Star Chumlee rolls into the shop with a 1950s Murray pedal car and a specific vision for how he wants it restored. Will Rick persuade him to go for a more classic restoration?

programme.desc: 'S9/E20 - High Scores in Arcadia'. The upper-class area of Arcadia promises solid auctions for the buyers. Darrell and Brandon come out swinging, but get caught trying to pull some shenanigans.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E21 - The Lion of Lancaster'. The buyers head up to Lancaster where Ivy is forced to defend his turf or score big with a home field advantage. Rene makes the long drive just to prove a point.

programme.desc: 'S23/E5 of 19 - When Pawns Cry'. When an early handheld video game system comes into play, can Corey make a deal before it's game over? Plus, a seller brings Rick a tambourine once played by Prince.

programme.desc: Musiekvideos vir elke smaak.

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3442 of 171'. Tossie se woonwa lyk haglik vandat Joe daar ingetrek het, maar hy maak hom reg om vir volle toesig oor hul dogtertjie te veg. Thseko raai Werner aan: Vertel Marcelle die waarheid...

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3443 of 171'. Tossie vra huurgeld vir die woonwa, maar Joe slaan haar met 'n vreeslike rekening terug. Krynauw en Braam pas Eileen se baba op sodat sy kan uitgaan... met Joe - en dis Candy se sangaand.

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3444 of 171'. Bali wil ook by Nora intrek, terwyl Marcelle hoop sy herken Werner tussen al die drawwers op TV. Doreen wil al haar duur rokke vir Chris teruggee en neem 'n bewonderende Henré saam.

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3445 of 171'. Elsa geeTsheko 'n moersleutel, maar dan kry sy 'n geskenk wat alles verander... Audrey is vrolik oor die deftige tafel wat sy gedek het - tot sy haar ma se pêrels om Nenna se nek sien.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S11/E123 of 260'. Ongevalle kry 'n nuwe locum, en Delia wil Rian betrek by haar en Tertius se planne. Steve word genoodsaak om met Conrad te praat oor Ruan, en Conrad spreek Louis aan oor Tonik.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S11/E124 of 260'. Delia is gespanne oor haar bloedtoetse, en Wimpie besing Janneke se lof. Uys en Gaby kry raad uit 'n onverwagse oord.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E167 of 238'. Justin is kleinlik wanneer Elana almal uitnooi na Anker, terwyl Junaid en Rhafiek vassit. Danni vra vir Chris en Kate 'n groot guns.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E168 of 238'. Elana het groot planne vir Anker, en Kaashifa gaan vir nog kankertoetse. Siya is onseker oor wat sy volgende skuif moet wees en beraam 'n plan, maar is dit te laat?

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E170 of 238'. Justin is gefrustreerd met sy loopbaan terwyl AB steeds in almal se pad is. Danni sukkel om Chris en Kate te oortuig van haar vermoedens, en besluit om sake in haar eie hande te neem.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E33 of 90'. Emile maak 'n groot onthulling oor Mortlocks en Janice is geskok. Hein besef Petra het hom om die bos gelei. Beatrice vind uit die lewe op die plaas is nie so idillies soos sy dink nie.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E34 of 90'. Thys is geskok om uit te vind dat Emile Janice se nuwe sakevenoot is. Hy bied hulp aan om van hom ontslae te raak. Beatrice maak vriende met Jessie van wie Theo voorheen gepraat het.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E35 of 90'. Ruby besluit wat sy volgende jaar gaan doen. Beatrice wonder oor 'n lewe sonder Clint en Emile is 'n absolute nagmerrie vir Janice.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E36 of 90'. Janice besluit om saam met Emile te werk, ter wille van Mortlocks. Bianca is oortuig Hein gaan vir Yvette vra om te trou en Beatrice slaap onder die sterre met Theo.

programme.title: Met 'n Huppel In Die Stap

programme.title: Naked Singularity
programme.desc: A book-inspired legal drama with sci-fi and heist themes. Frustrated with the justice system, a New York City public defender is pulled into a high-stakes heist to beat the system.

programme.title: Lady Boss: The Jackie Collins Story
programme.desc: A fascinating documentary following the inspiring life and career of brilliant writer Jackie Collins, who's known as the ultimate 'Lady Boss' and a master storyteller.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: This film proves that dynamite comes in small packages. A family of tiny people live beneath the floorboards of a cottage. But when their home is threatened, they take action.

programme.title: Joey And Ella
programme.desc: A fun family film. When Ella encounters Joey, a baby kangaroo, she has no idea that Joey has a magical diamond that crooks are after, leading her on a quest to get Joey to safety.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: Dennis Quaid and Queen Latifah drive this family film. A grieving, shy 12-year-old relocates to rural Florida. There he encounters a captured Bengal tiger hidden in the woods.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox return for another action-packed, Michael Bay film. Sam must help the Autobots fight an ancient threat sworn on returning to get their revenge.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: The electrifying sequel to the hit movie based on the video game. When Dr Robotnik returns to Earth with a new ally, Knuckles, Sonic and his new friend Tails must stop them.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg directs this adaptation of the 1957 musical. Follow the forbidden love from two people from two rival teenage street gangs of different ethnic backgrounds.

programme.title: Family Squares
programme.desc: In this all-star family drama, the long-buried secrets of an estranged family are revealed when they gather via Zoom following the death of their matriarch.

programme.title: The American King
programme.desc: Fans of 'Coming To America' will like this Akon-led comedy. When a mysterious Priestess arrives in the USA to fulfil a 400-year-old prophecy, the CIA scrambles to investigate.

programme.title: Love In The Forecast
programme.desc: In this charming romantic film, an aspiring meteorologist swears off dating to concentrate on her career. However, she soon finds herself suddenly pursued by men everywhere.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: When a man meets the girl of his dreams he tells her a careless lie. The more the lie backfires the more ridiculous his quest for love becomes.

programme.title: Moonshot
programme.desc: A rom-com with a futuristic spin. As Mars is terraformed, two college students sneak aboard a space shuttle to join their significant others on the red planet.

programme.title: Dino Dana The Movie
programme.desc: A fun dinosaur adventure from director JJ Johnson. With the help of her sister and her neighbour, Dana undertakes an experiment to find out where all the kid dinosaurs are.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: Moms may relate to this comedy starring Sarah Drew (Grey's Anatomy). A busy mom's night out doesn't go according to plan when the dads are left in charge of the kids.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Trucks and monsters come together to create a non-stop action adventure. A teenager forms a bond with a creature that's being hunted by an evil oil company and fights to save it.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2
programme.desc: A thrilling, adventure-filled sequel. Bored of life in the garden, Peter goes to the big city, where he meets shady characters and ends up creating chaos for the whole family.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: As an unhappy 13-year-old who turns almost 30 overnight, Jennifer Garner is both funny and endearing in this sweet wish-fulfilment comedy. This was her breakthrough movie role.

programme.title: A Journal For Jordan
programme.desc: Denzel Washington directs this touching love story inspired by a true story and a memoir. A soldier in Iraq writes a journal filled with advice for his young son.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A gold-digging teacher is given the boot by her fiancé, when he sees through her. She soon falls for a colleague, but faces some stiff competition.

programme.title: LPL Pro: CS:GO 2022
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 of 7 - LPL Pro CS: GO Season 2'. LPL Pro CS:GO returns for another season. Watch the best Counter-Strike teams across ANZ compete in three stages to see who will be crowned champions!

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 of 13 - Gears of War 1-4'. Epic Games Gears of War goes through our detailed history in this new episode of Origins.

programme.title: Esport Rewind Season 1 110: The Intern
programme.desc: 'Esport Rewind - Eps. 110: The International'. Relive the biggest stories, craziest moments and epic plays from this instant classics.

programme.title: Games Set To Music
programme.desc: Stunning graphics and massive tunes combined: wind down with some of the biggest game titles on your TV screen and get ready to chill!

programme.title: Shut Up & Play!

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 of 12 - Rayman'. Bursting out of France in the 90s, Rayman was a driving force that helped shape Ubisoft into the industry titan it is. Teenagers' ingenuity led him to create one of the most popular platforming games of all time.

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: 'S4/E12 of 12 - Age of Empires'. From laying siege to fortresses, to taking mankind's first step into new worlds, Age of Empires has allowed players to delve into history for decades. We recount how this iconic strategy game came to be.

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 of 10 - Crash Bandicoot'. Spinning onto our screens in the 90s, Crash became a mainstay for kids around the world. It's fiendish traps, extravagant level design and quirky humour became an instant classic.

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 of 10 - Minecraft'. Smash a block, place a block, two simple functions that created one of the most popular games of all time. Minecraft became the brainchild of one man, who created something that became a cultural phenomenon.

programme.title: The Daily Portal
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 of 38'. Join Louise Schofield every weekday evening for the latest in all things gaming, streaming and esports, Keeping you in the know with everything that's happening.

programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Storkules in Duckburg!'. When Storkules appears in Duckburg, Louie recruits him to start a monster fighting business. Storkules agrees but his biggest battle is to be Donald's roommate and maintain his friendship.

programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Griffin and Harper successfully set the dial on the radio to take them back to 1962 where they find Savannah working at the Tremont with her new adoptive parents!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Time After Time'. Harper is surprised to find Griffin at the hatch waiting for her. He says that he saw that she'd traveled back to the date her father died and asks if she tried to alter things.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - No Time to Waste'. While the Twins enlist Topher to confirm their haunting suspicions, Harper and Griffin travel back to 1930 to help unravel Harper's family secrets.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Time Out'. When Harper and Daisy get stuck in the wrong time periods, they must pretend to be each other to protect the secret of the portal and time travel.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Wrong Place, Wrong Time'. When Daisy struggles at pretending to be Harper, Griffin searches for the crystal to swap them. After the Twins don't hear from Topher, they try to capture the ghost themselves.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - It's About Time'. When Sam can't get his Time Machine to work, Savannah vows to help him! Meanwhile, Griffin tells Daisy that he thinks Topher is hiding something and enlists her to find answers.

programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Check-out Time'. Harper returns home and fills Griffin in on the deed, stolen land, and her visions of a fire. After Sam disappears, Savannah finds a note saying that he's travelled to the future.

programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Time Is Not on Our Side'. The Campbell's and the Dunn's prepare for the Tremont's Grand Re-opening! Harper and Griffin realize that the crystal is cracking which may prevent the Time Machine from working.

programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - The Itchies'. Bella invites old friend, Harper, a fashion vlogger, to Evermoor, hoping to boost her fashion cred. But Bella has bigger problems: splintered Bog Lice have escaped and are creating the itchiest of problems.

programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Twist of Fate'. A black prediction appears on the tapestry. The villagers are shocked, and say it must be guarded - so Seb will miss the Prom! Tara tries to help but makes things worse.

programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - A Fuffwah Too Far'. The tapestry has been stolen, Tara and Sorsha take the blame so Sorcha is expelled from the Circle and Tara is tagged. The real thieves, Esmerelda and Lacie, try to use it with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alex thinks high school will be easy but learns it's strict and full of rules. Coping with it seems impossible until a hidden room behind a secret door changes everything.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Treasure of the Found Lamp!'. The boys track a missing artefact across Duckburg, Scrooge and Webby stall a warrior looking for it with a phoney quest!

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - Little Frogtown/Hopping Mall'. Anne and the Plantars travel to the city of Newtopia.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E84 - Furious Fu'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face someone they know well...and never imagined they would have to fight someday.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E85 - Sole Crusher'. A newcomer to Marinette's circle of friends gets akumatized into Sole Crusher, a giant supervillain who can absorb people. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir be up to the task?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E86 - Queen Banana'. When Chloe gets akumatized into Queen Banana, Ladybug decides to entrust a Miraculous to a new and promising ally to help her stop the supervillain.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - Hole in One'. The Lab Rats accidentally ruin Davenport's $15m painting but manage to replicate it. The trouble starts when he tries to sell it and the forgery is discovered.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - Trucked Out'. Adam gets his driving licence so Davenport suggests buying him a nice safe vehicle, but Adam wants a monster truck. What will he end up getting?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Big Deal/Forbidden Feline'. Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Coffee Quest, Phoenix Rises'. There's a coffee shortage. Can Cricket get some? The Greens' dog Phoenix runs away. Can the family find her?

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Ivy On The Run/After The Rain'. Fed up with her mother's strict rules, Ivy concocts a plan to run away. Anne asks Hop Pop to retrieve the music box, revealing his secret.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E28 - Lost in Newtopia/Sprig Gets Schooled'. Anne and Polly take in the city. Sprig, college bound!

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - Song Sung Bad'. Lilly records a song for her mother but isn't very pleased with it, so Miley steps in to improve it. Jackson tries to tell Sarah that Rico likes her, but she thinks Jackson fancies her.

programme.title: Raven's Home

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E90 - Date Expectations'. Desperate to take Cami to a dance, Booker convinces Ivy to throw a party at the Chill Grill. But Cami's plans get in the way of Ivy having a successful party.

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Goat Your Own Way / the Very Hungry Ghost'. Molly insists on training an unruly goat the 'Molly way'. When the McGees celebrate a Thai holiday about feeding 'hungry ghosts', Scratch tries to keep the feast all to himself.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Scare Tactics / the Bad Boy Bobby Daniels'. When Scratch ditches class to goof off with Geoff, he struggles to pass his Scare Test. Molly and Scratch try to reunite Patty with her old flame: The Bad Boy Bobby Daniels.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Violet Behind the Ultra, the'. An overshadowed 13-year-old girl, finally gets to shine when a magical luchador mask bestows her with superpowers akin to those of the city's resident superhero, Black Scorpion.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E41 - Everybody Was Best Friend Fighting'. Hannah gets an extra ticket for a celebrity tennis tournament, and Lily and Oliver fight over it. Hannah plays tennis against Andy Roddick and Dakota Fanning.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Time'. Ben convinces Savannah to go to the dance, despite Griffin's efforts to stop her. When Savannah dances with Ben, Jess leaves in a jealous rage, alarming Griffin and Harper.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Elevator Action, Bad Influencer'. Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls for a huckster internet influencer, and Tilly makes an online video with Bill.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Mission Invisible'. Adam, Bree, and Chase are caught on Principal Perry's surveillance camera using bionics .

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Secret Roommate'. Binny shares her room with the ghost Melchior. They become a crack crime-solving team. At the same time they try to find out more about Melchior's mysterious past.

programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - A Thanksgiving Ultimatum'. The family competes in their annual Turkey Bowl at Thanksgiving. And, sick of his attitude and lack of motivation, Trent and Amber give Jonah an ultimatum.

programme.title: Enjoying Everyday Life With Joyce...

programme.title: Jonathan Shuttlesworth
programme.desc: Jonathan has been preaching the gospel full-time since May 2002. The nations of the world are overripe for revival - and we are determined to be a great part of it.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now With G Maldonado
programme.desc: Apostle Maldonado works with internationally known ministers and evangelists bringing hope to untold millions. His vision is to evangelise, affirm and send people to do the Will of God.

programme.title: Freshdew
programme.desc: Teaching and preaching from The Carpenter's Church, Port Harcourt, Rivers State, Nigeria.

programme.title: Winning Ways With Matthew Ashimolowo
programme.desc: Pastor Ashimolowo uses his dynamic gift as a pastor, teacher, mentor, businessman and spiritual father to inspire people to grow up in knowledge, grow big in the Great Commission and grow together in unity.

programme.title: 6 Bullets
programme.desc: An ex-mercenary is persuaded to help a martial artist find his missing daughter. He metes out justice to her kidnappers along the way.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg, Emma Stone, and Abigail Breslin reunite a decade later to face a new wave of zombies, new human survivors, and makeshift family drama.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Teenager Sean Anderson teams with his stepfather on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island.

programme.title: After Hours
programme.desc: Paul Hackett is a hapless guy whose night becomes increasingly surreal as he tries and fails to get home from work, and is pursued through NYC by a cast of bizarre characters.

programme.title: The Ultimate Warrior
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars in this explosive sci-fi thriller set in a futuristic New York. Only a few still live in the city where two rival gangs are at war.

programme.title: San Andreas
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an earthquake in California, a rescue-chopper pilot makes a dangerous journey across the state in order to rescue his daughter.

programme.title: The Last Boy Scout
programme.desc: The action is unstoppable and the bullets and insults fly as odd-couple Bruce Willis and Damon Wayans try to solve a murder case with political ties.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: When Lucy and her two sons, Michael and Sam, move to Santa Clara, they discover, to their peril, that the area is a haven for a gang of vampires.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Unable to tip a waitress, a man promises her that if he wins the lottery, she'll get half. When he wins, he wants to make good on his word, but his wife will do anything to stop this.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage drives this action thriller. A hunter catches a white jaguar, but all hell breaks loose when he ships it on the same ship as an arrested assassin.

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: Bruce Lee plays a young kung fu movie star whom the villainous Dr Land wants to control. He must face off Land's fighters in order to defend his independence.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Denzel Washington reprises his role as the hard vigilante Robert McCall. This time he is pushed to his limit when he seeks justice and revenge for someone he loved and lost.

programme.title: Under Siege
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL, now a cook, is the only person who can stop a gang of terrorists when they seize control of a US Navy battleship.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Chasing Skinwalkers'. Paul investigates evil shapeshifters known as skinwalkers. He tracks these mythical beasts from the heart of the Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Mummy Curse And Nazi Art Hoax'. Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse. Plus, he reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Breaking All The Rules'. Jack introduces his parents to the spooky mystery of the Aswang. Plus, Ozzy is baffled by a video of suspected poltergeist activity.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Mummy Curse And Nazi Art Hoax'. Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse. Plus, he reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Defend The Frontier'. The hidden city inside the mountain is within reach, but exploration means convincing locals for help. It's 40 below and the trailblazing ranchers are in danger.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Social Clusters'. An ongoing series of UFO sightings off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to examine the link between UFOs, the military and the ocean.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Arizona Anomalies'. A recent UFO sighting in Phoenix leads Chuck and the team to Sedona, AZ. They explore whether the area's energy vortexes act as portals for otherworldly visitors.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Escape From Area 51'. After an informant tells of an alien that reportedly escaped from Area 51, Chuck and the team go to Tonopah, NV, to investigate whether it still roams the area.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Nightmare Below Zero'. A man on a night-time snowmobile ride suddenly feels something has been implanted in his leg. And, an otherworldly beast stalks a family over three generations.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Men In Black'. Strange men in black suits knock on the door of a UFO witness after an eerie light show. A woman is terrorized by small humanoid creatures that only she can see.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Deadly Cults'. Whether its religious fire-and-brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Experimental Soldiers'. At the height of the Cold War, the USA searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Gold'. Gold is one of the most valuable treasures on Earth. Since ancient times, man has gone to extreme lengths to get it. But where is most of the gold today, and who owns it?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Secret Prisons'. A secret part of history has remained hidden, locked away for centuries in the hulls of ships in New York or in the depths of an abandoned copper mine.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Pearl Harbor'. December 7th, 1941 - a day of infamy that changed America forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did Franklin Roosevelt know about the attack beforehand?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E4 - Roswell Revealed'. Josh's search for alien life ends in the USA, with a hot case in Arkansas. And, there's shocking new evidence in the Roswell crash.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Return Of The Yeti'. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Monster And The Mountain'. Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves. Plus, he investigates the mystical ties the fabled beast has with the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Time To Believe'. Jack tries to convince his parents that time travel is real! He also shares evidence of an Alexa possessed by an evil spirit and an Ice Age UFO.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Jim Beam Distillery'. Nick and Katrina are in the historic Jim Beam Distillery, exploring employee claims that bourbon is not the only spirit locked inside its huge warehouse.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Alaskan Loch Ness Monster'. A cryptozoologist investigates reports of a sea monster in Alaska. He reviews eyewitness accounts and examines never-before-seen video evidence.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Haunted Cabin And Giants'. A woman claims to be under attack from an unseen force. Could it be linked to a Native American legend about a mysterious race of giants?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Stockholm Syndrome'. Don Wildman visits a plaza in Sweden that was at the centre of an infamous heist. He also examines a monument in Florida that recalls a near catastrophic war.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Black Magic Rocket Scientist'. Don Wildman heads to Pasadena, CA, to explore the mysterious death of a renowned scientist. He also examines one of Mt. Everest's deadliest disasters.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
