programme.desc: 'S3/E7'. Marisa de Vries se wasgoedkamer is besig om stadig te verdrink onder al die rommel. Tuis se ontrommel span help vir Marisa om haar was-goedkamer in 'n is-goedkamer te verander.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E8'. Whitney Mouton het 'n naelsalon in die stoorkamer van haar huis ingerig, maar daar is nie genoeg pakplek vir die naellak nie. Carin en Jani help vir Whitney om plek te maak vir werk en wegpak.

programme.title: Sing In Harmonie
programme.desc: 'S2/E15'. Die grootste skoolkore-kompetisie is terug met koorsang van ons land se top skoolkore. Kom reis saam met ons deur die land op soek na die beste skoolkore in Suid-Afrika.

programme.title: Wys My 'n Huis
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. In hierdie episode is jong verloofdes Kayla en Darren op soek na hul eerste huis in Brakpan. Tydens hul ontmoeting met eiendomsagent Calvin word dit duidelik dat Darren kompromieë moet aangaan, want Kayla se smaak spel Sandton.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Dinge raak kleurvol in Kemptonpark. Aaanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels help vir Jannie en Annemarie du Randt om hul TV-kamer 'n bietjie kleur te gee.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Ons kuier in Grabouw op die Paul Clüver Familielandgoed waar Lynette Francis-Puren uitvind hoe hulle vrugte- en wynproduksiemetodes aangepas is om klimaatsverandering teen te werk deur die natuur aan die stuur te sit.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Daar is een dag oor voor die top-drie deelnemers bepaal word. In dié episode kyk ons of die vroue goeie versorgers is. Stacy het 'n besluit om te neem en emosies loop hoog nadat die top-drie deelnemers aangekondig is.

programme.title: Die VIA-Kersmark
programme.desc: VIA-Kersmark gee lekker idees vir geskenke dié kerstyd. Ons wys en spog met plaaslike entrepreneurs se produkte en só kry álmal geskenke onder die kersboom hierdie jaar.

programme.title: Jan - R.S.V.P
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Michelin-ster-sjef Jan Hendrik van der Westhuizen omskep 'n plaashuisie in SA in 'n eetkamer en nooi Annelize van der Ryst en Ingrid Jones vir ete. Dié kuier inspireer 'n dis wat op die spyskaart van JAN in Nice bedien gaan word.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Elbé en Christo Lindeque en leer hoe hierdie eklektiese Suid-Afrikaners 'n pragtige kasteel in die Franse platteland restoureer.

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Depressie na lewensveranderende trauma. Na 'n duikongeluk op 26 het Tommy se lewe onherroeplik verander. Skakel in vir Tommy se storie op Kies die lewe met Ivor Swartz.

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Dr. Elna gee insig in hormonale behandeling vir polisistiese ovariumsindroom en hoe dit jou sekslewe kan affekteer. 'n Vrou kla oor haar man wat nie die eerste stap neem wanneer dit by seks kom nie.

programme.title: Inkopie Uur
programme.desc: Besighede en organisasies kry hier die geleentheid om met hul werk en produkte te spog.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S26/E7 - Escaping The City'. A Long Island native who spent her life working in Manhattan is ready to fulfil her dream of moving permanently to the Hamptons.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Second Chance At A Country Home'. After years of living in Waco, a couple dream of moving to the country with their three kids. Chip and Joanna help them get their perfect property.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Change Of Scenery'. Alison joins forces with a husband-and-wife realtor team to restore a three-bedroom Spanish Revival in California's Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - A Charred Charmer For Cory'. Mina and Karen tackle a 100-year-old home that's suffered fire and foundational damage. Cory loves its potential and wants to make it his permanent home.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - From Los Angeles To Laurel'. Erin and Ben are on a mission to restore houses in their town. They are helping Richard T Jones and Nancy Robinson find and renovate a home to rent out.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: 'S6/E15 - Beaming With Potential'. Tarek and Christina find a four-bed home in Cypress, California, that the owner is looking to sell quickly. But is there potential in this open-plan house?

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: 'S7/E1 - A Deceiving Deal'. Tarek and Christina uncover some unpleasant surprises after buying a tenant-occupied home in Whittier. Will they be able to clean up the mess?

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Pool Party Paradise'. Tony and Paul help a couple finish their outdoor entertaining space. They build a dream pool complete with grotto, slide, waterfall, barstools, and spa.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Million Dollar Design'. Leslie and Lyndsay are on a mission to convert a couple's sprawling 1970s home into a profitable nest egg.

programme.title: Kendra Sells Hollywood
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Split Decisions'. Time is running out, and Kendra has yet to meet her qualifications to stay with the company. Given one last chance, she must choose between her kids and her career.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S13/E12'. David Bromstad helps lucky Americans buy their dream properties. The families, couples and individuals have won big in the lottery or on scratch cards.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S7/E3'. Mum and daughter duo, Karen E. Laine and Mina Starsiak, buy up rundown homes in Indianapolis and transform them into stunning urban remodels.

programme.title: Beach Flip
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Guest Who's Coming?'. With the mid-renovation appraisal looming, the teams pull out all the stops to add as much value as possible during the guest bedroom and landing challenge.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Old Friends, New Upgrades'. Lyndsay and Leslie help their old school friends sell a dated tri-level home in a neighborhood of new builds.

programme.title: Saving The Manor
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Long Cold Shower'. The manor's outdoor bathrooms are collapsing and need extensive renovation. Dean and Borja plan to transform the rotting facilities into an upmarket garden spa.

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - 100-Year-Old Fixer'. Raisa and Austin renovate a 100-year-old home and reconfiguring it to meet the needs of its first-time homeowners will stretch their design limits.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Kid-Friendly Lakeside Retreat'. A couple bought a waterfront property with a stunning view of the lake. Dave and Jenny must turn this humdrum house into an artsy, kid-friendly home.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - From 90s House To Stylish Home'. A father longs to turn his drab bachelor pad into a cosy place for him and his two sons. Dave and Jenny's design features bourbon and baseball.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Perfect For Paradise'. Retta announces which ugly home receives a $150,000 makeover! Designer Alison Victoria takes over with a life-changing full renovation.

programme.title: Reno My Rental
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Eclectic Rental Retreat'. Carmeon Hamilton helps a creative couple turn their brown kitchen and bland deck into eclectic spaces they'll love. And she does it all on a tiny budget!

programme.title: Beach Flip
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Room With A View'. Four teams are in an epic renovation competition. Mentored by Nicole Curtis, Josh Temple and David Bromstad, each team transforms their own beachfront house.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S26/E8 - Gulf Shores, Alabama'. Two sisters search for a vacation home in the Gulf Shores area of Alabama. With seven kids between them, it may be tricky to find a property with enough space.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Rustic Italian Dream Home'. A couple are moving to Texas to be closer to family. They enlist the help of Chip and Joanna to create a rustic Italian-style dream home.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Back To The Client Game'. Alison takes on a young Chicago couple with a big wish list and a tight budget. She'll have to use all her tricks to create their dream home.

programme.title: Renovation Goldmine
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Upstairs Downstairs'. Meg and Joe help a couple who loves the quirks of their historic Chicago home add sophisticated style to their main bedroom suite.

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Design team Raisa Kuddus and Austin Coleman use low-cost, high-impact design and homeowner sweat equity to transform the houses of first-time homebuyers.

programme.title: Selling The Hamptons
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Heat is On'. It's summer in the Hamptons which means sun, fun and high stakes real estate. The brokers at Nest Seekers face fierce competition from their own teammates.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Old Friends, New Upgrades'. Lyndsay and Leslie help their old school friends sell a dated tri-level home in a neighborhood of new builds.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Switching Rooms'. Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner wanting to sell their four-bedroom home in Garden Grove. After buying they find the layout is pretty unusual.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Post-Purchase Problems'. Tarek and Christina buy a partially renovated home in Anaheim. Is this house a flipper's dream or are the structural issues the first of many problems?

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Wildebeest and Waterfalls'. Texas grandparents want the ultimate backyard and waterfall feature for their grandkids. The team builds a huge fire pit and a dog-friendly baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Build the Pool, and They Will Come'. Grandparents want a pool the grandkids will love. The team devises a raised pool and a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Perfect For Paradise'. Retta announces which ugly home receives a $150,000 makeover! Designer Alison Victoria takes over with a life-changing full renovation.

programme.title: Saving The Manor
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Judge A Book By Its Cover'. Dean and Borja want to convert the stable's hayloft into a palatial one-bedroom apartment, which will create much needed rental income.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - Quaint Cottage, Vintage Vibes'. Mina and Karen upgrade a quaint but pricey cottage. They must work out how to add a garage, a bedroom, and a bathroom without losing its vintage charm.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S7/E6 - Eastside Americana Cottage'. In Near Eastside, Mina and Karen hope a two-story addition with an Americana cottage design will turn a heftier profit than the area's last project.
